source_section.title_label_raw: General Signage Requirements Temporary Sign By-law

provisions.heading_context_raw: Signage Requirements Temporary Sign By-law
provisions.text: This By-law does not apply to any sign regulated by HRM By-law S- 801, A By-law Respecting Licensing of Temporary Signs. Sign Permit Exemptions

sections.title_label_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a development permit:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signs giving the name of a building or its civic address;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signs regulating activities that are not related to traffic, such as "No Trespassing" or "Beware of Dog" signs, if the sign does not exceed 0.2 square metre in area;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signs that pertain to the sale, rental, or lease of real property on a lot where the signs are displayed, if they:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: are non-illuminated,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: do not exceed 2.0 square metres in area,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: are removed within 14 days following the sale, rental, or lease, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: are limited in number to a maximum of one sign for every streetline;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signs regulating traffic on a lot, including directional signage, if the sign does not exceed 0.5 square metre in area;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signs erected by any government;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: notification signs required under municipal by-laws;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signs interior to a structure;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: commemorative signs;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signs identifying motor vehicle sharing spaces;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signs that are incidental to a construction in progress, if the signs:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: are non-illuminated,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: are located on the same lot as the construction in progress,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: do not exceed 5.0 square metres in area, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: are removed within 14 days following the conclusion of construction;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: one internally illuminated menu-box sign per restaurant use, if the sign:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: is located within 2.0 metres of the pedestrian entrance for the restaurant use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: does not exceed 0.4 square metre in area, as measured from the outside of the box, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: does not project more than 0.1 metre from the wall on which it is affixed;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: signage related to a drive-through;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: subject to Sections 468, 469, and 470, in any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, signs for any of the following uses:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: home occupation use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: short-term bedroom rental use (RC-Feb 21/23;E- Sep 1/23),

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: daycare use,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: sale of urban agricultural products as an accessory use, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: urban farm use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: the replacement of a sign face where there is no alteration of the structure holding the sign;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: neighbourhood signs; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following signs are exempt from the requirement of a
provisions.text: window and door signs. Prohibited Signs

sections.title_label_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs that create a hazard to public safety;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: in the opinion of the traffic authority, signs that:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: are a source of danger to traffic on the street, or that obstruct or interfere with the vision of road users because of their location, appearance, or illumination,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: obscure or interfere with any traffic control sign or device, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: resemble the traffic control signs of any public authority, in shape, colour, message, symbol, or location;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs that obscure or interfere with any warning or instructional sign;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs that obstruct or interfere with any ventilation device, emergency exit, required exit, window, door opening, or any wall opening intended as a means of ingress or egress;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs that obstruct access to any emergency related equipment or infrastructure, such as fire hydrants and firefighting hose connections;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs located on fences or retaining walls;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: excluding signs on a registered heritage property, signs that advertise a product or service that is no longer available on the premises, or a business that is no longer in operation;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs located on the roof of any structure;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs that project above a roof edge or a streetwall stepback, or extend beyond the edges of any wall to which they are affixed;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: excluding any property located in an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, signs affixed to or painted on natural objects such as trees or boulders;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: excluding neon gas tubing and variable message signs, signs that use fluorescent colours;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: internally-illuminated fascia signs, except for:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: neon gas tubing,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: open or exposed neon gas tubing channel letters and characters,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: front-lit, individually raised profile letters and characters with LED illumination,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: front-lit, standard channel letters and characters with LED illumination, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: reverse channel (halo-lit) letters and characters with either neon gas tubing or LED illumination;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: internally-illuminated awning signs;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs that incorporate a strobe light or flashing light; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: signs that interfere with any utility, conduit, or line used for water, sewage, gas, electricity, or communication.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: In addition to the types of signs prohibited in Subsection 459(1), the following types of signs are prohibited for use on registered heritage properties or on properties within heritage conservation districts:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: variable message signs;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: digital or LED display signage; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following types of signs are prohibited in all zones:
provisions.text: front-lit, standard channel letters and characters with LED illumination. Variable Message Signs

sections.title_label_raw: Variable message signs shall only be permitted:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Variable message signs shall only be permitted:
provisions.text: Variable message signs shall only be permitted:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Variable message signs shall only be permitted:
provisions.text: in a DD, DH, CEN-2, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Variable message signs shall only be permitted:
provisions.text: if, in the opinion of the Engineer, the variable message sign does not pose a risk to public safety. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22) Fascia Signs on Registered Heritage Buildings

sections.title_label_raw: Fascia signs on registered heritage buildings shall be required to be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Fascia signs on registered heritage buildings shall be required to be:
provisions.text: Fascia signs on registered heritage buildings shall be required to be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Fascia signs on registered heritage buildings shall be required to be:
provisions.text: located and sized to fit within the architectural frieze above a storefront or a door; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Fascia signs on registered heritage buildings shall be required to be:
provisions.text: where no architectural frieze exists, located in a horizontal band above the upper line of the ground floor windows, and below the lower sill of the second storey windows.
